name: Priya Sharma
text: Beautiful designs and genuine hallmarked gold. Our family has trusted Rupmilan for three generations.

name: Anjali Verma
text: Bought my bridal set from here. The craftsmanship is unmatched and the purity is guaranteed.

name: Rahul Agrawal
text: Best place for gold jewellery in Chhattisgarh. Transparent pricing and excellent service.

name: Sunita Patel
text: I always buy from Rupmilan. Their daily wear collection is lightweight and stylish.

name: Meena Sahu
text: Wonderful experience every time. The staff is so helpful and the designs are modern yet traditional.

name: Deepak Tiwari
text: Purchased gold coins and chain. BIS hallmark gives complete confidence in purity.

name: Kavita Jain
text: The festive collection is gorgeous! Got so many compliments on my new necklace set.

name: Rajesh Kumar
text: Trusted jeweller since decades. My entire family shops here for every occasion.

name: Pooja Gupta
text: WhatsApp support is so convenient! I selected my earrings from photos and picked up next day.

name: Vivek Soni
text: 35 years of trust is no joke. Rupmilan is the gold standard in our city.
